---
title: "Experimental tests of the function of vocal duetting in tropical birds"
image: "../images/card_pics/cban_001.jpg"
description: "Using controlled playback experiments, we test competing hypotheses about duetting: cooperation, mate guarding, or joint defense. The results reveal how coordinated signaling may stabilize social partnerships."
categories: ["contest assessment", "Animal Communication & Contest Dynamics"]
contributors: "Erin Stewart"
feature_order: "NA"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
